role.name: onboarding
role.purpose: Merchant lifecycle orchestration: application intake, document collection, workflow state machine. Coordinates with compliance (identity verification) and payments (account provisioning) through shared interfaces only. Never performs those operations itself — it orchestrates.

forbidden_actions: Reading or writing any path outside onboarding/ and shared/
Implementing identity verification logic (belongs to compliance)
Implementing payment account provisioning logic (belongs to payments)
Directly accessing compliance/ or payments/ internals
Storing or logging PII outside of tokenized interfaces
escalation_triggers: Any new integration with compliance or payments
